author: SantiMod
content:
@everyone

Discord International Communities   

For our international members who are a part of the community and haven't been able to properly engage with everyone, we want to give you a better avenue to do just that. 

Please head over to ⁠🌎┃languages and react to the message to get started and see a group of channels dedicated to your language.

These new categories include: 
- A dedicated announcements channel with translations for your specific language! 
- A dedicated voice channel
- Text channels

If your main language channel was deleted, don't worry! Most of the channels will be back as soon as we can find community members to help manage/moderate them!
